name: claude-usage-tracker
description: Query and drive the Claude Usage Tracker from a Claude chat — 5h/weekly usage, extra-usage spend, and (for team admins) the team overview + monthly ledger.

tools.name: get_usage
tools.description: Live 5-hour/weekly utilization, context, and extra-usage spend.

tools.name: get_status
tools.description: Tracker live/stale, Anthropic status, and update availability.

tools.name: get_team_overview
tools.description: Team-admin: per-member load, month-to-date spend, near-limit members.

tools.name: get_team_ledger
tools.description: Team-admin: per-member monthly spend + tokens for a month.

tools.name: import_spend_report
tools.description: Ingest an exported spend-report CSV into the ledger.

port.title: Tracker port (optional)
port.description: Only set this if the tracker isn't on its default port. Leave blank to auto-detect from the tracker's server_port file.
